coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.desc: Every product undergoes rigorous testing to meet IS/IEC 62305 and international standards.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.desc: We tailor solutions to each client's unique requirements and provide ongoing support.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.desc: Continuous R&D to bring the latest lightning protection technologies to our customers.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.desc: Transparent pricing, honest assessments, and reliable warranty commitments.

milestones.title: Founded
milestones.desc: Started as a team of dedicated electrical professionals with a vision to provide reliable lightning protection and earthing solutions.

milestones.title: Product Development
milestones.desc: Introduced advanced lightning protection systems using ESE and conventional technologies, along with advanced maintenance-free earthing systems. Compliance : IS, IEEE & NF C 17 - 102

milestones.title: 1000 + Successful Projects
milestones.desc: Successfully completed more than 1000 lightning protection and earthing installations across industrial, commercial, and residential sectors in India.
